hero.title: Manage your deliveries like a pro
hero.subtitle: Automate and optimize your delivery operations with our all-in-one platform. Real-time tracking, inventory management, and advanced analytics.

features.title: Powerful Features
features.subtitle: Everything you need to manage your deliveries efficiently

delivery.title: Delivery Management
delivery.description: Create, assign, and track your deliveries in real-time with an intuitive interface.

tracking.title: Real-time Tracking
tracking.description: Track your drivers on the map and keep your customers informed in real-time.

inventory.title: Inventory Management
inventory.description: Manage your inventory, receive low stock alerts, and optimize your levels.

partners.title: Partner Management
partners.description: Manage your partners, their commissions, and delivery history.

reports.title: Financial Reports
reports.description: Generate detailed reports on your revenue, expenses, and performance.

analytics.title: Performance Analytics
analytics.description: Analyze your drivers' performance and optimize your operations.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Get started in three simple steps

1.title: Create a Delivery
1.description: Add delivery details in a few clicks. Customer info, address, items, and more.

2.title: Assign a Driver
2.description: Choose the nearest available driver or let the system assign automatically.

3.title: Track in Real-time
3.description: Track delivery progress live and inform your customer at every step.

dashboardPreview.title: A modern and intuitive interface
dashboardPreview.subtitle: Discover our powerful and easy-to-use dashboard

benefits.title: Why Choose Delivoo?
benefits.subtitle: The advantages that make the difference

time.title: Save Time
time.description: Automate your processes and save hours every day.

costs.title: Reduce Costs
costs.description: Optimize your routes and reduce operational expenses.

tracking.title: Live Tracking
tracking.description: Keep your customers informed and improve their satisfaction.

performance.title: Improve Performance
performance.description: Analyze your data and make informed decisions.

1.quote: Delivoo has transformed how we manage deliveries. We've gained 30% time and reduced costs by 20%.
1.author: Marie Dupont

2.quote: Real-time tracking is a game-changer. Our customers are more satisfied and we have fewer follow-up calls.
2.author: Jean Martin

3.quote: The interface is intuitive and the support team is excellent. I highly recommend Delivoo.
3.author: Sophie Bernard

pricing.title: Simple and Transparent Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Choose the plan that fits your needs
pricing.defaultDescription: A plan tailored to your growth.

billing.note: Save up to {{percent}}% with yearly billing.

whatsappAssistant.title: WhatsApp assistant built in
whatsappAssistant.subtitle: Connect your WhatsApp, map groups to partners, and let Delivoo create deliveries automatically.
whatsappAssistant.cardTitle: Turn a WhatsApp message into a delivery
whatsappAssistant.step2: Map each group to a partner.
whatsappAssistant.step3: Orders shared in groups become deliveries instantly.
whatsappAssistant.step4: Statuses are posted back to the group automatically.
whatsappAssistant.highlight: Reduce calls, speed up order capture, and keep partners informed at all times.

mobileApps.title: Delivoo in your pocket
mobileApps.subtitle: Download the app for your teams and track every delivery in real time, wherever you are.
mobileApps.feature3: Proof of delivery and quick signatures.

previewItems.title: Precise tracking
previewItems.description: Locate drivers and ETA in a glance.

previewItems.title: Smart alerts
previewItems.description: Receive updates without opening the dashboard.

previewItems.title: Fast control
previewItems.description: Accept, assign, and close out in a few taps.

mobileApps.highlight: The mobile app is included in your plan at no extra cost.

1.question: How does the free trial work?
1.answer: You can try Delivoo free for 14 days. No credit card required.

2.question: Can I change plans anytime?
2.answer: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time.

3.question: Do you offer an API?
3.answer: Yes, our REST API allows you to integrate Delivoo with your existing systems.

4.question: How does support work?
4.answer: We offer email support for all plans and priority support for Professional and Enterprise plans.
